snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE | MPL ID S17 | Playoffs Day 3 | English
snippet.description:
Welcome to Day 3 of the MPL ID Season 17 Playoffs! 🔥

The stakes have never been higher as the Playoffs continue with two crucial matches that could define the fate of the remaining contenders. Every game matters, every decision counts, and only the strongest teams will keep their championship dreams alive.

The first match features Team Liquid ID versus Bigetron Esports in a true do-or-die battle. Both teams are fighting for survival, knowing that a loss means immediate elimination from MPL ID S17. With everything on the line, who will rise to the occasion and keep their journey alive?

The second match will showcase an exciting clash between ONIC and GEEK Fam. More than just a spot in the next round, this match carries international implications as both teams move one step closer to securing a ticket to MSC 2025 in Paris.

ONIC enters the series as the most dominant team of the season, while GEEK Fam continues to prove themselves as one of the most dangerous challengers in the league. Will ONIC continue their path of dominance, or can GEEK create another statement victory on their Playoff run?

Don't miss a day filled with high-pressure moments, incredible plays, and battles that could shape the road to both the MPL ID S17 Championship and the international stage.

The critically-acclaimed ‘Enola Holmes’ franchise has returned, taking Enola far from London, where personal and professional dreams collide on a case more tangled and treacherous than any she has faced before. Directed by Philip Barantini (the Emmy Award-winning director of ‘Adolescence’), the film stars Millie Bobby Brown, Louis Partridge, Henry Cavill, and Helena Bonham Carter. snippet.title: Star Song - Rob Deniel (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
#StarSong #RobDeniel #MyHusbandisaMafiaBoss #VicorMusic
Rob Deniel drops an official music video of “Star Song,” the official soundtrack of the Viva One series My Husband is a Mafia Boss, starring Joseph Marco as Ezekiel “Zeke” Roswell and Rhen Escaño as Aemie Romero.

Relying on the cosmic divine for signs, Rob Deniel’s newest single “Star Song” captures the very moment a person realizes they have finally found “the one.” Perfectly describing a fatalist kind of attraction, the singer-songwriter remains a musician willing to go to great lengths in the name of romance.

i can’t tell you why 
but something inside 
is dancing with fire 
eyes lit like the sky 
turned tears into diamonds 
got good at goodbyes
 
just know that i will find my way from you               
like flowers from a tomb 
while you decide who you are 
and i can see right through
like shadows on the moon 
and it’s all bad news  
 
yeah i i i 
hate that i made you love me 
sorry if i made me your type 
yeah i i hate that i made you love me 
cause i barely tried 
 
what’s happening now ?
you studied my crown 
and borrowed my body 
warm, kissed by the sun 
then cold like the wind 
a bee stuck in honey
 
know that i will find my way from you 
i guess it’s kinda cute
how you like me where you are 
but i can see right through
just don’t eclipse the moon
cause it’s all bad news
 
yeah i i i 
hate that i made you love me 
sorry if i made me your type 
yeah i i hate that i made you love me 
cause i barely tried 
 
i’ve held your projections when you’ve felt so insecure 
tell me why is it this way 
why you so hate to see women endure 
is it really my fault 
you all gave me your hearts 
of your own accord ?
i don’t really think so 
 
 i i i 
hate that i made you love me 
sorry if i made me your type 
yeah i i hate that i made you love me 
cause i barely tried
